metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.19-beta.23
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Adds explicit WAV 16/24/32-bit PCM, RMS-I, metadata preservation and 16-bit dither. - Adds bounded Pitch, Rate, Gain and normal/reverse batch variants. - Runs one render task per defer cycle with progress and stop-after-current. - Adds TSV reports and temporary-file safe overwrite commits.
